content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 202 Destroy the Mountain

On the mountain top.

The Evil Wonderland warriors looked pale, while Xie Kui popped up from the earth and looked at Yang Mu coldly, “How dare you kill him?”

“Why not?” Yang Mu laughed, jumping off from the Double-Headed Dragon and standing besides Shi Yan, and smiled to Shi Yan, “You ok?”

“I’m fine.” Shi Yan shook his head with a smile.

“The Third Stage?” Yang Mu was surprised, as his eyes wandered on Shi Yan’s chest.

The wound on Shi Yan’s chest was recovering slowly but at a visible speed.

“Yeah.” Shi Yan nodded.

“The Disaster Realm?” Yang Mu didn’t look at Xie Kui, but mumbled to himself, “It’s unreasonable.”

Since he has the Immortal Martial Spirit, Yang Mu knew it well. Generally, one needed to advance to the Earth Realm to get to the Third Stage of the Immortal Martial Spirit.

Shi Yan was merely at the Disaster Realm, but his Immortal Martial Spirit had already reached the Third Stage, which was rather abnormal.

“Yes, I’m at the Second Sky of Disaster Realm.” Shi Yan nodded again.

Yang Mu showed even more surprise in his eyes.

Those Evil Wonderland warriors including Xie Kui and He Qingman looked not at ease after Yang Mu showed up.

Sheng Yidan gazed at Shi Yan’s chest, and then showed a little bitterness. Shi Yan’s chest showed that he had the Immortal martial Spirit, so she knew now they had been all wrong; Shi Yan was a direct offspring of the Yang Family.

Shi Yubai was killed by Yang Mu, but the Evil Wonderland warriors didn’t dare to do anything although they were angry.

“You killed our people, I will tell it to the family head. We won’t spare you!” Xie Kui looked gloomy, as he wiped the blood on his mouth corner, “At this crucial moment, you killed your ally. I don’t think you still need our help.”

“Hmm.” Yang Mu sneered and shook his head, “Just tell your family head. Let’s see what will you do to us? You don’t rule the Evil Wonderland, if you leave the Demon Dwellers alone, you can expect more of them. Let’s see how will your Evil Wonderland fares?”

Xie Kui’s expression changed slightly.

The Demon Dwellers had entered the Kyara Sea. Although they hated the Yang Family most, it’s tough for them to shake the Yang Family.

On the contrary, the Evil Wonderland and the Xia Family were the target of the Demon Dwellers because they were weaker.

Even if the Evil Wonderland and the Xia Family didn’t attack the Demon Dwellers, the latter would still cause trouble with them.

Yang Mu smiled, took out a green pill, and handed it to Shi Yan, “How are you now?”

Shi Yan took the pill and swallowed it at once. He soon felt a warm sensation in his belly.

The pill was mildly taking effect on his chest.

This pill sped up the recovering of the wound as its power entangled the wound like slim strings.

“There are dozens of the Demon Dwellers on the Black Stone Island, including several experts at the Second Sky of Nirvana Realm. We entered the quarry and met the Demon Dwellers...” Shi Yan explained briefly.

“Demon Dwellers of the Second Sky of the Nirvana Realm?” Yang Mu was a little surprised, as he nodded his expression turning heavy, “It seems to be tough now. It’s out of expectation that Nirvana Realm Demon Dwellers appeared on this small island. They have made up their mind.”

“Qingman, you mean the Nirvana Realm Demon Dwellers were found by him?” Xie Kui was listening to He Qingman’s explanation, causing him to frown.

He Qingman nodded slowly and explained in a low voice, “He has a certain treasure that helps him to detect the Demon Dwellers. He was the first to find the Demon Dwellers in the cave. It’s just that we didn’t pay attention to it. Sister Nan, Sister Nan...”

He Qingman’s voice shook again.

“The Demon Dwellers were first found by you?” Yang Mu’s hearing was great; he glanced at Shi Yan in surprise.

After seeing Shi Yan nodded, Yang Mu laughed and praised, “You are something! Haha! No wonder great grandpa said you are extraordinary. This time I came because great grandpa sent me here to take you back.”

Shi Yan beamed, “Just with the help of a treasure.”

The great grandpa was the head of the Yang Family, King Yang Qing.

He Qingman didn’t show any surprise, but Xie Kui and Sheng Yidan’s expression changed.

Especially for Sheng Yidan, he regretted a lot for not having noticed that Shi Yan was special.

Whoever drew King Yang Qing’s attention must be something and would probably be an expert in the Endless Sea. If they knew of this earlier, they would have listened to Shi Yan and avoided the battle with the Demon Dwellers.

“Xiao Yan, let’s go. After killing the Demon Dwellers, we will go back to the Immortal Island at once. You came from so far away. It’s time for you to go home.” Yang Mu whistled, and then the Double-Headed Dragon landed on the mountain top.

Yang Mu mounted to the Double-Headed Dragon, and then waved at Shi Yan, “Let’s go.”

Though confused, Shi Yan mounted the Double-Headed Dragon, and observed the Double-Headed Dragon as his eyes sparkled.

The Double-Headed Dragon was seven meters long, containing the power of Ice and flame in its two heads. The back of the dragon was as hard as iron, and its claws were sharp.

The Level Six demon beast, the Double-Headed Dragon, had two heads, and can spurt ice and flame. It’s one of the most able demon beasts in the Yang Family.

Before Shi Yan came to the Endless Sea, Xiao Hanyi had told him that he could get a Double-Headed Dragon if he was acknowledged by the family head. Shi Yan remembered it, so when he saw the real Double-Headed Dragon, he was excited.

“Haha, stop looking at it. You will have your own mount.” Yang Mu laughed, “Great grandpa had chosen a grumpy demon beast to test you. Prove that you can tame it.”

“Not the Double-Headed Dragon?” Shi Yan was surprised.

“No, it’s more frightening than the Double-Headed Dragon. Hehe, and great grandpa wants to test you with that demon beast. Xiao Yan, be prepared, and don’t be frightened by it.”

“Not the Double-Headed Dragon? Then what demon beast is that?”

“I will leave it for you to find it out yourself.”

As they chatted, they mounted the Double-Headed Dragon, while Xie Kui, He Qingman and others looked at them, frowning with strange expressions.

“There are Nirvana Realm Demon Dwellers in the cave?” Xie Kui asked Sheng Yidan.

“Of course.” Sheng Yidan nodded, “That’s why sister Nan was killed.”

Xie Kui nodded slightly, and sneered, “Let me see how will Yang Mu kill those the Demon Dwellers!

“Yeah.” He Qingman was confused too, “Yang Mu is able, but he is merely at the third Sky of Earth Realm, so he can’t win against those Nirvana Realm Demon Dwellers.”

“Let’s go!” Yang Mu laughed, urged the Double-Headed Dragon and flew to the quarry Shi Yan pointed at.

“B, brother.” Shi Yan was not used to calling someone brother, “Those Demon Dwellers are at the Nirvana Realm, can you really deal with it?”

“Don’t worry.” Yang Mu looked calm, “I will show you the Sky Bomb of the Yang Family. I have two Sky Bombs. To kill the Nirvana Realm Demon Dwellers with one of it is not a waste.”

The Sky Bomb?

Shi Yan knew Yang Mu was doing it for no reason.

Soon, sitting on the Double-Headed Dragon, Shi Yan and Yang Mu arrived above the quarry.

“Detect whether the Demon Dwellers are inside.” Yang Mu stood up on the Double-Headed Dragon, and then looked down at the quarry below him.

Shi Yan slowly nodded, took out the Soul Gathering Pearl, and began to percept.

A heavy smell of hatred came from deep within the quarry, and spirit waves approached as Shi Yan was searching.

Shi Yan’s expression changed as he withdrew the spirit power from the Soul Gathering Pearl, “It’s still here.”

“Then good.” Yang Mu laughed as his ring shone once and then a fist-like golden ball appeared in his palm.

Under Yang Mu’s control, that golden ball became golden light and struck the quarry.

“Bang, bang, bang!”

The power of a blast came from the quarry.

The Sky Bomb blast was so strong that it almost cracked the sky. Meanwhile, golden waves rippled in the sky.

Then, just in front of Shi Yan, the quarry exploded into ashes.

Among the golden light, the quarry crashed and was destroyed by the Sky Bomb in an instant.

------------------

Translated by: Wiyi

Edited by: Vick and Bobby

Translated by XianXiaWorld
